MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY NGU, CECILIA BINH MS. AS TO DEFENDANT CRESHON, MURRAY JR. MR. SMITH, CARRIE S. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-15-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGU, CECILIA BINH MS. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CRESHON, MURRAY JR. MR. SMITH, CARRIE S. (1) COURT FINDS THAT WHILE DEFT MURRAY DID REAR- ENDED PLFT'S CAR, IT CAUSED NO APPRECIABLE DAMAGE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
